mapper.select: SELECT * FROM movies WHERE title = #{title} AND release_year = #{releaseYear}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movies WHERE title = #{title}
SELECT * FROM movies ORDER BY title ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM movies m JOIN ( SELECT from_movie_id AS movie_id FROM connections WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT to_movie_id AS movie_id FROM connections WHERE user_id = #{userId} ) graph_movies ON graph_movies.movie_id = m.id ORDER BY m.title ASC

SELECT * FROM movies WHERE LOWER(title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{title}), '%') OR LOWER(director) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{title}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(tagline, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{title}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(synopsis, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{title}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(genres, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{title}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(cast_members, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{title}), '%') ORDER BY CASE WHEN LOWER(title) = LOWER(#{title}) THEN 0 WHEN LOWER(title) LIKE CONCAT(LOWER(#{title}), '%') THEN 1 WHEN LOWER(director) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{title}), '%') THEN 2 WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(genres, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{title}), '%') THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, title ASC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT m.* FROM movies m WHERE 1 = 1
AND ( LOWER(m.title) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') OR LOWER(m.director) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(m.tagline, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(m.synopsis, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(m.genres, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(m.cast_members, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM movie_genres mg WHERE mg.movie_id = m.id AND LOWER(mg.genre) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM movie_people mp WHERE mp.movie_id = m.id AND LOWER(mp.person_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') ) )
AND ( LOWER(m.director) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{person}), '%') OR LOWER(COALESCE(m.cast_members, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{person}), '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM movie_people mp WHERE mp.movie_id = m.id AND LOWER(mp.person_name) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{person}), '%') ) )
AND ( LOWER(COALESCE(m.genres, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{genre}), '%') OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM movie_genres mg WHERE mg.movie_id = m.id AND LOWER(mg.genre) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{genre}), '%') ) )
AND m.release_year = #{releaseYear}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM connections c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND (c.from_movie_id = m.id OR c.to_movie_id = m.id) )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM connections c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND (c.from_movie_id = m.id OR c.to_movie_id = m.id) )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN LOWER(m.title) = LOWER(#{query}) THEN 0 WHEN LOWER(m.title) LIKE CONCAT(LOWER(#{query}), '%') THEN 1 WHEN LOWER(m.director) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') THEN 2 WHEN LOWER(COALESCE(m.genres, '')) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{query}), '%') THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, m.title ASC
ORDER BY m.title ASC
LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO movies ( title, release_year, director, picture_url, external_id, tagline, synopsis, genres, runtime_minutes, cast_members, director_notes ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{releaseYear}, #{director}, #{pictureUrl}, #{externalId}, #{tagline}, #{synopsis}, #{genres}, #{runtimeMinutes}, #{castMembers}, #{directorNotes} )
mapper.update: UPDATE movies SET title = #{title}, release_year = #{releaseYear}, director = #{director}, picture_url = #{pictureUrl}, external_id = #{externalId}, tagline = #{tagline}, synopsis = #{synopsis}, genres = #{genres}, runtime_minutes = #{runtimeMinutes}, cast_members = #{castMembers}, director_notes = #{directorNotes} WHERE id = #{id}
